text:
実は遺跡も行かなきゃ行かなきゃって
ずーっと思ってたんだよねー。

ご存じの通り、ダーカーばっかで
大変だし、危険だし……ってことで
パートナーはあなたしかいないな、と。

あなたとなら、いつでもどこでも
まあなんとかなるでしょ、って
思ってね。

You know, I'd always had this nagging
desire to get us out to the ruins.

I know they're filled with Falspawn and it's no
place to visit lightly. But I also figured
you're probably the only person I could ask.

When I'm with you I feel like we can manage
to get through anything and everything that
comes our way.
So! Let's go see if that's really true!
